code:
import io
import string
import list

fn at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = at_byte(s, i)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut neg = false
      if b == 45
        neg = true
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut num = 0
      mut reading = true
      while reading
        if i >= n
          reading = false
        else
          let c = at_byte(s, i)
          if c >= 48 and c <= 57
            num = num * 10 + (c - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            reading = false
          end
        end
      end
      if neg
        num = -num
      end
      result = list.push(result, num)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn at_byte(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    -1
  end
end

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = sorted.len()
  while i < n
    let v = at(sorted, i)
    if not inserted and x <= v
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn sort_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    let v = at(xs, i)
    sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  sorted
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line)
let sorted = sort_list(nums)

mut output = ""
mut j = 0
let m = sorted.len()
while j < m
  let v = at(sorted, j)
  if j == 0
    output = "#{v}"
  else
    output = "#{output} #{v}"
  end
  j = j + 1
end

println(output)
